displayTitle: The Mandalorian and Grogu: The Deluxe Junior Novelization
synopsis: A novelization that retells the Star Wars film The Mandalorian and Grogu— and includes sixteen pages of full-color images and a poster. Join the Mandalorian and Grogu as they set off on a mission from the New Republic to save the son of Jabba the Hutt from an evil warlord. This junior novel, which includes sixteen pages of full-color imags and a poster, retells The Mandalorian and Grogu , directed by Jon Favreau, and is sure to thrill fans of all ages.
title: Star Wars: The Mandalorian and Grogu: The Deluxe Junior Novelization
